en: How do you pronounce this word? Any guesses? The most common pronunciation is
key. And in fact, that's the only pronunciation listed by the Cambridge, Collins, and Oxford
dictionaries. Merriam-Webster does give two alternatives. It gives k and quay. But since
most dictionaries only list key, I would go with that pronunciation. A key is a platform
in a harbor. Key, pronounced just like this word, key.
